commands.cmd: read-only profile/schema/API/settings, diary/source, goal-history, projection, measurement, chart and test map

summary: Mapped the additive preference seam and trustworthy/query-bounded inputs for all remaining individual charts; selected a four-preference current-view vertical before richer aggregate work.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM completed the same read-only map as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: A Judge must approve the exact preference schema/defaults and current-view behavior before migration work.
The bounded aggregate/source service, weight privacy slice and card/planner preference selection remain later tasks.
